_comment: Known importer-of-record profiles. When the extracted isf_importer_name matches a 'match' value (case-insensitive, punctuation-stripped), the importer_* fields in the payload are overridden with the canonical 'fields' below. Edit this file to add your importers; no code changes needed. Or point billing_settings.isf_importers_path at an external file outside the source tree to keep proprietary data private.
